suite.name: Checkout Flow

kw.name: Abrir Aplicacion
Validar Configuracion
Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Should Not Be Empty
kw.doc: Verifies that the given item is not empty.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: File Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given ``path`` points to an existing file.
Verifica que las variables mínimas existan y que el binario esté accesible.

kw.name: Construir Capabilities
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Variable Should Exist
kw.doc: Fails unless the given variable exists within the current scope.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Set To Dictionary
kw.doc: Adds the given ``key_value_pairs`` and/or ``items`` to the ``dictionary``.
Construye el diccionario de capabilities según la plataforma. Centraliza TODAS las diferencias Android/iOS en un solo punto.

kw.name: Log Dictionary
kw.doc: Logs the size and contents of the ``dictionary`` using given ``level``.

kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.1/cli/args/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | no | alias | | strict_ssl | No | allows you to send commands to an invalid certificate host like a self-signed one. |

kw.name: Set Appium Timeout
kw.doc: Sets the timeout in seconds used by various keywords.
Abre la app con capabilities dinámicas según Android. Falla temprano con mensaje claro si falta configuración.

test.name: Compra exitosa de Sauce Labs Backpack

kw.name: Given que el usuario abre la aplicación y se encuentra en la pantalla de Login
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: When el usuario ingresa las credenciales válidas
Esperar Y Escribir
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el input sea visible y escribe el texto.

kw.name: Esperar Y Escribir
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el input sea visible y escribe el texto.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Esperar Y Hacer Clic
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el elemento sea visible y lo presiona.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Autentica con el usuario estándar del reto.

kw.name: And selecciona el producto "Sauce Labs Backpack" para añadirlo al carrito
kw.source_name: selecciona el producto "${nombre_producto}" para añadirlo al carrito

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Scroll Hasta Elemento
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipe from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional duration. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided using percent.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: msg=Elemento ${locator} no encontrado luego de ${max_intentos} swipes.
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Scroll robusto cross-platform hasta hacer visible el elemento.

kw.name: Esperar Y Hacer Clic
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el elemento sea visible y lo presiona.

kw.name: Verificar Que Estoy En Detalle Producto
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Esperar Y Hacer Clic
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el elemento sea visible y lo presiona.
Seleccionar el producto desde el catálogo, abrir su detalle y añadirlo al carrito. Valida el contador del cart badge.

kw.name: And completa el proceso de Checkout con datos ficticios
Esperar Y Hacer Clic
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el elemento sea visible y lo presiona.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Hasta Elemento
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipe from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional duration. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided using percent.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: msg=Elemento ${locator} no encontrado luego de ${max_intentos} swipes.
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Scroll robusto cross-platform hasta hacer visible el elemento.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Text

Esperar Y Escribir
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Text
kw.doc: Clears the text field identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given `text` into text field identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el input sea visible y escribe el texto.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments, if ``condition`` is true.

kw.name: Hide Keyboard
kw.doc: Hides the software keyboard on the device. (optional) In iOS, use `key_name` to press a particular key, ex. `Done`. In Android, no parameters are used.
Llena el formulario de dirección con los datos ficticios provistos.

kw.name: Continuar A Pago
Scroll Hasta Elemento
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipe from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional duration. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided using percent.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: msg=Elemento ${locator} no encontrado luego de ${max_intentos} swipes.
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Scroll robusto cross-platform hasta hacer visible el elemento.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Esperar Y Hacer Clic
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el elemento sea visible y lo presiona.
En Android el botón puede quedar debajo del teclado/fold; hacemos scroll defensivo antes de presionarlo.

kw.name: Verificar Que Estoy En Checkout Pago
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Scroll Hasta Elemento
Run Keyword And Return Status
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.
Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Swipe By Percent
kw.doc: Swipe from one percent of the screen to another percent, for an optional duration. Normal swipe fails to scale for different screen resolutions, this can be avoided using percent.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.

kw.name: Esperar Y Hacer Clic
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click element identified by `locator`.
Espera a que el elemento sea visible y lo presiona.
Recorre los 3 pasos del checkout con datos ficticios. Datos controlados en un único punto aquí (podrían moverse a un variables/test_data.yaml si crecen).

kw.name: Then el sistema debe mostrar una pantalla de confirmación con el mensaje de éxito
Verificar Confirmacion De Compra Exitosa
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until element specified with `locator` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
Valida tanto el título de la pantalla como el mensaje de éxito. Doble aserción para dar evidencia robusta en el report.html.
Aserción final del escenario: pantalla "Checkout Complete".

test.doc: Un usuario autenticado puede seleccionar un producto, completar el checkout con datos válidos y recibir la pantalla de confirmación de compra exitosa.

kw.name: Cerrar Aplicacion
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Close Application
kw.doc: Closes the current application and also close webdriver session.
Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.
Cierra la sesión Appium aun si la prueba falló.

suite.doc: Suite E2E: Flujo de compra exitosa en Swag Labs Mobile App. Escenarios escritos en sintaxis Gherkin (Given/When/And/Then) sobre la app my-demo-app-rn de Sauce Labs.
